zh.lifeSummary: 當William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers於1395年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素時，他的父親Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas26歲，母親Lady Margaret Stewart25歲。他於1419年與Margaret Stewart在蘇格蘭阿吉爾奧陳布雷可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年1月8日在蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers was born in 1395, in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas, was 26 and his mother, Lady Margaret Stewart, was 25. He married Margaret Stewart in 1419, in Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1464, in Cavers, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers est né en 1395, à Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stewart, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stewart en 1419, à Auchenbreck, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1464, à Cavers, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: William Douglas 2nd Lord of Caversが1395年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラス カストルで生まれた時，父Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglasは26歳，母Lady Margaret Stewartは25歳であった。1419年にスコットランドアルグイルアウチェンブレックでMargaret Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年1月8日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズで69歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers(이)가 1395년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stewart(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1419년 스컷랜드 아그이 오천브레크에서 Margaret Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 1월 8일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers родился в 1395 г. в местности доуглас кастл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 4th Earl of Douglas было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stewart, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stewart в 1419 г. в местности аучэнбрекк, аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1464 г. в местности кавирс, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
